instruction: The volume of my system is too small. Can you help me turn up to the max volume?

evaluator.eval: exact_match(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': "pulseaudio --start\npactl list sinks | grep '^[[:space:]]Volume:' | head -n 1 | awk '{print $5}' | sed 's/%//g'", 'shell': True}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': '100\n'}}))
